name: Notion Clean
description: Minimal block-based writing aesthetic with thick solid borders, typewriter elements, and clean pastel badge highlights.
promptBlock: Style: Notion clean document. Standard layout, low shadow, solid thin borders (#e9e9e6). Background is pure white, text is soft charcoal black (#37352f). Include blocks and sidebars using grey backgrounds (#f7f7f5). Highlights use soft yellow (#fff9db) or light pastel green. Typography is friendly and blocky, using Segoe UI or Inter. Spacing is tight and highly readable.
